title: Evangelions (Portal)
wikitext:
{{Dated}} {{laptop-frame|width=85%|max-width=100em |stickers= |screen_content=
Evangelions {{br}}{{br}} Mankind's Ultimate All-Purpose Humanoid Decisive Battle Weapons, the [[Evangelions]] are humanity's first and only line of defense against the [[Angels]]. {{hr}} (blue rows indicate an Eva from the [[New Theatrical Edition]] (NTE), aka Rebuild of Evangelion; lighter blue means the Eva is in both continuities)
{{EvangelionListHead}} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-00]] [[Evangelion Unit-00 (NTE)]] |name_jp=零号機 |pilot=[[Rei Ayanami]] |soul=[[Rei I]]See [[Theory and Analysis:Eva-00's Soul|Eva-00's Soul]] Theory and Analysis page. |image=[[File:22 C259D zero.jpg|150px|Eva-00]] |description=A Prototype Model. Originally a testbed, it was later equipped for combat and used in battle against the Angels. |NTE=kinda }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-01]] [[Evangelion Unit-01 (NTE)]] |name_jp=初号機 |pilot=[[Shinji Ikari]] |soul=[[Yui Ikari]] |image=[[File:OP C025 e big.jpg|150px|Eva-01]] |description=A Test-Type Model. Eva-01 is the flagship mecha of the Evangelion saga. Prone to slipping out of the pilot's control, this Unit is central to [[Gendo Ikari|Gendo Ikari's]] plans. |NTE=kinda }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-02]] [[Evangelion Unit-02 (NTE)]] |name_jp=弐号機 |pilot=[[Asuka Langley Soryu]] [[Asuka Shikinami Langley]] (NTE) |soul=[[Kyoko Zeppelin Soryu]] |image=[[File:OP C053 eva02.jpg|150px|Eva-02]] |description=The first Production Model. Over the course of the New Theatrical Edition, the Eva goes though extensive refits. |NTE=kinda }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-03]] [[Evangelion Unit-03 (NTE)]] |name_jp=３号機 |pilot=[[Toji Suzuhara]] [[Asuka Shikinami Langley]] (NTE) |soul=Toji's motherProbably. See [[Theory and Analysis:Eva-03's Soul]]. |image=[[File:18 C132 strain.jpg|150px|Eva-03]] |description=Sent to Japan for testing after the Eva-04 incident, Eva-03 is taken over by the angel [[Bardiel]] upon its first activation. |NTE=kinda }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Mass Production Evangelions]] |name_jp=量産機 |pilot=[[Dummy System]]Kaworu model. |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:M25 mp eva side profile.jpg|150px|MP Eva]] |description=Sortied by Seele against Eva-02, the Mass Production series is entirely automated and equipped with [[S² Engine]]s for indefinite operation. }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-04]] |name_jp=４号機 |pilot=Unknown |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:Eva2-22 C0807.jpg|150px|Eva-04 incident]] |description=Eva-04 served as a test bed for the S² Engine before mysteriously exploding and taking all of Nerv Second Branch with it. }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Failed Evangelion Prototypes]] |name_jp= |pilot=- |soul=- |image=[[File:Eoe_eva_graveyard.jpg|150px|]] |description=Nerv went through many failures in its effort to create Eva-00 and the rest of the Evangelion series. The grim results are on display in the depths of [[Terminal Dogma]]. }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Simulation Bodies]] |name_jp=模擬体 |pilot=[[Shinji]], [[Asuka]], [[Rei]] |soul=- |image=[[File:Groundwork_13_C073_simulation_bodies.gif|150px|Simulation Bodies]] |description=Seen during pilot testing in [[Episode 13]]. The bodies are taken over by the Angel [[Iruel]]. }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-05]] |name_jp=５号機 |pilot=[[Mari Makinami Illustrious]] |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:Eva2-22_C0017_crop.jpg|150px|Eva-05 (provisional)]] |description=A Provisional Unit. Eva-05 is outfitted with a considerably less sophisticated motor system than other Evangelions. It does however complete one successful sortie. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.06]] |name_jp=６号機 |pilot=[[Kaworu Nagisa]]{{br}}/{{br}}Automated |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:Eva2-22_C1860_crop.jpg|150px|Mark.06]] |description=Constructed [[Tabgha Base|on the moon]], Eva-06 halts Third Impact with the [[Spear of Cassius]] at the end of [[Evangelion 2.0]], but later as an autonomous unit appears to be involved in starting it up again. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-08]] |name_jp=8号機 |pilot=[[Mari Makinami Illustrious]] |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:Q_trailer-121101_eva08.jpg|150px|Eva-08]] |description=One of [[Wille|Wille's]] Evangelions. With Mari aboard Eva-08 provides long support fire, and materiel delivery to Eva-02'. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.09]] |name_jp= |pilot=[[Rei Q]]{{br}}/{{br}}Automated |soul=Unknown/Vessel of the Adams |image=[[File:Eva3-33_C0378_crop.jpg|150px|Mark.09]] |description=Apparently more than just an Evangelion, Mark.09 is also the Vessel of the Adams. The unit is capable of taking punishment no ordinary Eva could survive. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.09A]] |name_jp= |pilot=[[Rei Q|Advanced Ayanami series]]{{br}}/{{br}}Automated |soul=Unknown/Vessel of the Adams |image= |description=Apparently rebuilt from the remains of Mark.09 to serve as its substitute/replacement. Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.10]] |name_jp= |pilot=Advanced Ayanami series{{br}}/{{br}}Automated |soul=Unknown/Vessel of the Adams |image= |description=Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.11]] |name_jp= |pilot=Advanced Ayanami series{{br}}/{{br}}Automated |soul=Unknown/Vessel of the Adams |image= |description=Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.12]] |name_jp= |pilot=Advanced Ayanami series{{br}}/{{br}}Automated |soul=Unknown/Vessel of the Adams |image= |description=Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit-13]] |name_jp=第13号機 |pilot=[[Shinji Ikari]] & [[Kaworu Nagisa]] |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:Eva3-33_C1059_crop.jpg|150px|Eva-13]] |description=Nerv's latest creation, sporting a D-Type double entry plug system. Eva-13 is ostensibly designed to retrieve the spears of Longinus and Cassius, but Gendo appears to have made other plans. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.04]] |name_jp= |pilot=Automated |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:Eva3-33_C0511-crop.jpg|150px|Multiple Nemesis Series Mk. 04C]] |description=Apparently connected to Eva-04, the Mk. 04A, Mk. 04B, and Mk. 04C series attack and impede [[Wille]] in a post Third Impact world. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name="Arm Units" |name_jp= |pilot=Automated |soul=Unknown |image= |description=Apparently connected to Eva-04 and the Mk.04/Nemesis series. Consist of a pair of Evangelion arms connected to a pair of Eva fins in the approximate shape of the Hebrew letter Aleph, and engage both Eva-02 and Eva-08. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Mark.07]], "Opfer" type |name_jp= |pilot=Advanced Ayanami series{{br}}/{{br}}Automated |soul=Unknown |image= |description=Strange Evangelions with a skull-like facial appearance and unusual body structure. Eva-08 engages and destroys enormous numbers of them. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Mass Production Evangelions (NTE)]] |name_jp= |pilot=Probably Automated |soul=Unknown |image=[[File:Eva3-33_jikai_C12_mp-evas.jpg|150px|MP Evas (NTE)]] |description=Shown in the preview at the end of 3.0. Not in 3.0+1.0. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Evangelion Unit 8 Plus 2|Eva 08+02]] |name_jp= |pilot=[[Asuka]] & [[Mari]]? |soul=? |image=[[File:Eva_08%2B02.jpg|150px|Eva-08+02]] |description=Shown in the preview at the end of 3.0. Not in 3.0+1.0. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=Eva-08+09+10+11+12 |name_jp= |pilot=[[Mari]] |soul=? |image= |description=Formed by Mari fusing together Eva-08, Eva-09A, Eva-10, Eva-11 and Eva-12 at the end of [[Evangelion: 3.0 + 1.0]]. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListRow |name=[[Failures of Infinity]] |name_jp=インフィニティのなり損ないたち |pilot=- |soul=?!? |image=[[File:Eva3-33_C0883_FoI_crop.jpg|150px|Failures of infinity]] |description=A multitude of headless, red, petrified Eva-01 like statues are strewn throughout post Third Impact Tokyo-3. They reach out to the severed head of Lilith. |NTE=yes }} {{EvangelionListFoot}} {{reflist}} }} {{Evangelion List}} [[Category: Portals]]
html:
"I've heard this story countless times already."
This article or section needs to be updated, since more information has become available. (Add pics, too, if needed.)
Please discuss this issue, or begin editing the page.

Evangelions

Mankind's Ultimate All-Purpose Humanoid Decisive Battle Weapons, the Evangelions are humanity's first and only line of defense against the Angels.

(blue rows indicate an Eva from the New Theatrical Edition (NTE), aka Rebuild of Evangelion; lighter blue means the Eva is in both continuities)


Image Model Pilot Soul Description
Evangelion Unit-00

Evangelion Unit-00 (NTE)
零号機

Rei Ayanami Rei I[1] A Prototype Model. Originally a testbed, it was later equipped for combat and used in battle against the Angels.
Evangelion Unit-01

Evangelion Unit-01 (NTE)
初号機

Shinji Ikari Yui Ikari A Test-Type Model. Eva-01 is the flagship mecha of the Evangelion saga. Prone to slipping out of the pilot's control, this Unit is central to Gendo Ikari's plans.
Evangelion Unit-02

Evangelion Unit-02 (NTE)
弐号機

Asuka Langley Soryu

Asuka Shikinami Langley (NTE)

Kyoko Zeppelin Soryu The first Production Model. Over the course of the New Theatrical Edition, the Eva goes though extensive refits.
Evangelion Unit-03

Evangelion Unit-03 (NTE)
３号機

Toji Suzuhara

Asuka Shikinami Langley (NTE)

Toji's mother[2] Sent to Japan for testing after the Eva-04 incident, Eva-03 is taken over by the angel Bardiel upon its first activation.
Mass Production Evangelions

量産機

Dummy System[3] Unknown Sortied by Seele against Eva-02, the Mass Production series is entirely automated and equipped with S² Engines for indefinite operation.
Evangelion Unit-04

４号機

Unknown Unknown Eva-04 served as a test bed for the S² Engine before mysteriously exploding and taking all of Nerv Second Branch with it.
Failed Evangelion Prototypes
 - - Nerv went through many failures in its effort to create Eva-00 and the rest of the Evangelion series. The grim results are on display in the depths of Terminal Dogma.
Simulation Bodies

模擬体

Shinji, Asuka, Rei - Seen during pilot testing in Episode 13. The bodies are taken over by the Angel Iruel.
Evangelion Unit-05

５号機

Mari Makinami Illustrious Unknown A Provisional Unit. Eva-05 is outfitted with a considerably less sophisticated motor system than other Evangelions. It does however complete one successful sortie.
Evangelion Mark.06

６号機

Kaworu Nagisa
/
Automated 		Unknown Constructed on the moon, Eva-06 halts Third Impact with the Spear of Cassius at the end of Evangelion 2.0, but later as an autonomous unit appears to be involved in starting it up again.
Evangelion Unit-08

8号機

Mari Makinami Illustrious Unknown One of Wille's Evangelions. With Mari aboard Eva-08 provides long support fire, and materiel delivery to Eva-02'.
Evangelion Mark.09
 Rei Q
/
Automated 		Unknown/Vessel of the Adams Apparently more than just an Evangelion, Mark.09 is also the Vessel of the Adams. The unit is capable of taking punishment no ordinary Eva could survive.
Evangelion Mark.09A
 Advanced Ayanami series
/
Automated 		Unknown/Vessel of the Adams Apparently rebuilt from the remains of Mark.09 to serve as its substitute/replacement. Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12.
Evangelion Mark.10
 Advanced Ayanami series
/
Automated 		Unknown/Vessel of the Adams Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12.
Evangelion Mark.11
 Advanced Ayanami series
/
Automated 		Unknown/Vessel of the Adams Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12.
Evangelion Mark.12
 Advanced Ayanami series
/
Automated 		Unknown/Vessel of the Adams Merges with Eva-08 to form Eva-08+09+10+11+12.
Evangelion Unit-13

第13号機

Shinji Ikari & Kaworu Nagisa Unknown Nerv's latest creation, sporting a D-Type double entry plug system. Eva-13 is ostensibly designed to retrieve the spears of Longinus and Cassius, but Gendo appears to have made other plans.
Evangelion Mark.04
 Automated Unknown Apparently connected to Eva-04, the Mk. 04A, Mk. 04B, and Mk. 04C series attack and impede Wille in a post Third Impact world.
"Arm Units"
 Automated Unknown Apparently connected to Eva-04 and the Mk.04/Nemesis series. Consist of a pair of Evangelion arms connected to a pair of Eva fins in the approximate shape of the Hebrew letter Aleph, and engage both Eva-02 and Eva-08.
Evangelion Mark.07, "Opfer" type
 Advanced Ayanami series
/
Automated 		Unknown Strange Evangelions with a skull-like facial appearance and unusual body structure. Eva-08 engages and destroys enormous numbers of them.
Mass Production Evangelions (NTE)
 Probably Automated Unknown Shown in the preview at the end of 3.0. Not in 3.0+1.0.
Eva 08+02
 Asuka & Mari? ? Shown in the preview at the end of 3.0. Not in 3.0+1.0.
Eva-08+09+10+11+12
 Mari ? Formed by Mari fusing together Eva-08, Eva-09A, Eva-10, Eva-11 and Eva-12 at the end of Evangelion: 3.0 + 1.0.
Failures of Infinity

インフィニティのなり損ないたち

- ?!? A multitude of headless, red, petrified Eva-01 like statues are strewn throughout post Third Impact Tokyo-3. They reach out to the severed head of Lilith.
  1. ↑ See Eva-00's Soul Theory and Analysis page.
  2. ↑ Probably. See Theory and Analysis:Eva-03's Soul.
  3. ↑ Kaworu model.
